seoTitle: How to Add a Degree Symbol in Canva Easily
metaDescription: Insert the degree symbol into your Canva text for temperature readings, measurements, or scientific and culinary graphics.
intro: Small details like a correctly placed degree symbol matter in graphics involving temperature, measurements, or scientific data. This guide covers how to access and insert the symbol into your Canva text. It's useful for educators, marketers, and content creators working on infographics or business presentations that need precise symbols.

steps.heading: Access the degree symbol
steps.body: Within your text box in Canva, find the way to insert special characters like the degree symbol.

steps.heading: Insert it into your design
steps.body: Add the symbol directly where it's needed, such as next to a temperature figure.

steps.heading: Check formatting
steps.body: Confirm the symbol displays correctly at your chosen font size and style.

steps.heading: Apply to your final graphic
steps.body: Use the completed text with the degree symbol across your infographic or presentation.

faq.question: Can I copy and paste a degree symbol into Canva?
faq.answer: Yes, pasting a degree symbol from another source into a Canva text box typically works.

faq.question: Does the degree symbol work with all Canva fonts?
faq.answer: Most fonts support the standard degree symbol character, though very stylized fonts may render it differently.

faq.question: Is this useful outside of temperature graphics?
faq.answer: Yes, it's also common in academic degree references or angle measurements in design work.
